context: Tests whether a store-locator answer follows the MapKit skill's SwiftUI Map, search, routing, selection, and location lifecycle guidance.

checklist.name: SwiftUI Map
checklist.description: Uses SwiftUI Map APIs as the primary map surface instead of defaulting to MKMapView.

checklist.name: Camera State
checklist.description: Uses MapCameraPosition or equivalent SwiftUI map camera state.

checklist.name: Markers
checklist.description: Uses Marker or Annotation for store results.

checklist.name: Selection Tags
checklist.description: Uses a map selection binding with marker tags matching the selected value type.

checklist.name: Autocomplete
checklist.description: Uses MKLocalSearchCompleter for autocomplete rather than full searches on every keystroke.

checklist.name: Resolved Search
checklist.description: Uses MKLocalSearch with a completion or natural-language query to resolve real map items.

checklist.name: Route Overlay
checklist.description: Uses MKDirections.Request and MapPolyline(route.polyline) or equivalent MapPolyline route drawing.

checklist.name: Map Controls
checklist.description: Includes a user-location control such as MapUserLocationButton or UserAnnotation plus relevant map controls.

checklist.name: Location Privacy
checklist.description: Calls for NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription and a denied-location recovery or fallback path.

checklist.name: Task Lifecycle
checklist.description: Cancels or scopes search, route, and location tasks to the feature lifecycle.
